title: Supporting people from overseas to settle in New Zealand :: Immigration New Zealand
content:
## Supporting people from overseas to settle in New Zealand
Immigration New Zealand works across government to help people new to New Zealand settle into life here.
- The NZ Migrant Settlement Integration Strategy and NZ Refugee Resettlement Strategy Refresh Project These strategies were updated in 2023 to make sure they reflect the settlement aspirations and needs of migrants and refugees.

## The NZ Migrant Settlement Integration Strategy and NZ Refugee Resettlement Strategy Refresh Project
These strategies were updated in 2023 to make sure they reflect the settlement aspirations and needs of migrants and refugees.
- Migrant Settlement and Integration Strategy The New Zealand Migrant Settlement and Integration Strategy (NZMSIS) was updated in 2023. The Strategy now covers migrants who have the ability to settle permanently in New Zealand, those on a residence visa and those who have a clear pathway to residence.

## Migrant Settlement and Integration Strategy
The New Zealand Migrant Settlement and Integration Strategy (NZMSIS) was updated in 2023. The Strategy now covers migrants who have the ability to settle permanently in New Zealand, those on a residence visa and those who have a clear pathway to residence.
- Settlement information We are responsible for ensuring recent migrants, their employers and the settlement sector, have accurate and accessible information.

## Settlement information
We are responsible for ensuring recent migrants, their employers and the settlement sector, have accurate and accessible information.
- Settlement services Immigration New Zealand works with agencies across government to provide settlement services, tailored to the needs of specific groups of migrants.
Immigration New Zealand works with agencies across government to provide settlement services, tailored to the needs of specific groups of migrants.
- How we fund settlement services We allocate settlement funding across government to support services aligned with the New Zealand Migrant Settlement and Integration Strategy (the Strategy).

## How we fund settlement services
We allocate settlement funding across government to support services aligned with the New Zealand Migrant Settlement and Integration Strategy (the Strategy).
- How we measure success We want to make sure the settlement information and services we provide are helping to achieve good settlement outcomes for recent migrants.

## How we measure success
We want to make sure the settlement information and services we provide are helping to achieve good settlement outcomes for recent migrants.
